programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: Miami Vice
programme.desc: Police officers Sonny Crockett and Ricardo Tubbs are assigned to a dangerous mission.They are busting a gang of drug smugglers, led by a man named Montoya.The trafficker is believed to be involved in the murder of two federal agents and the family of their informant.Crockett and Tubbs infiltrate the Montoi organization.Sonny begins an affair with Isabella, who invests the proceeds of crime in legal ventures.Crockett tries to protect his lover, having no idea what the woman actually does and what her true identity is.Meanwhile, Tubbs and his girlfriend, analyst Trudy Joplin, try to understand the activities of criminals using their own methods.Ricardo does not know that he is putting his beloved in danger.Wanting to reach the gang leader, two detectives decide to transport a load of drugs to southern Florida.Gradually, the lines between the rules of the underworld and the rule of law are blurring.

programme.title: Gaga Chromatica Ball
programme.desc: The performance of the famous singer Lady Gaga recorded in 2022 at Dodger Stadium in Los Angeles.The concert, which was part of The Chromatica Ball's tour promoting its sixth album, took place in front of an audience of 52,000.The singer performed, among others:their greatest hits, such as "Stupid Love", "Bad Romance", "Just Dance", "Poker Face", "Shallow", and "Rain On Me".The whole is complemented by songs played on the piano, amazing choreography, spectacular pyrotechnics and the artist's spectacular stylings.

programme.title: Hollywood On Set 23
programme.desc: The program takes viewers behind the scenes of film production.In each episode, the creators discuss three cinema hits.They show how spectacular effects, impressive sets and acting performances are created.

programme.title: El bus de la vida
programme.desc: Music teacher Andrés (Dani Rovira) lives in the Basque Country.He is soon diagnosed with cancer, which forces him to often visit the hospital in Bilbao.To get to the facility for treatment, he regularly uses an old bus driven by Mai (Susana Abaitua), who transports him and other cancer patients free of charge.Thanks to conversations with other passengers, the teacher manages to control his fear and look to the future with hope.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Ballers 5
programme.desc: Spencer Strasmore, although his career as an American football star has already ended, still leads an exciting life.Now his job is to help people trying to make it in the world of sports.

programme.title: Four Letters of Love
programme.desc: Ireland.Margaret (Helena Bonham Carter) and Muiris (Gabriel Byrne) Gore have two children, Sean (Dónal Finn) and Isabel (Ann Skelly).The family's happiness is disturbed by the unexpected illness of their son.On another part of the island lives William Coughlan (Pierce Brosnan), who quit his job and left his loved ones to follow his dreams of being a painter.The fates of two families intertwine thanks to the Gore's daughter and the son of an unfulfilled artist, Nicholas (Fionn O'Shea).It turns out that young people are made for each other, even though they know nothing about each other.Destiny and the desire for love push them towards each other.Adaptation of the book of the same title by Niall Williams.

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman
programme.desc: Early 1970s, Colorado Springs, Colorado.Ron Stallworth (John David Washington) becomes the first black police officer in the department.After encountering manifestations of racism, he asks to be transferred to undercover work.He decides to infiltrate the Ku Klux Klan, but for this he will need the help of an older, white colleague - Flip Zimmerman (Adam Driver).Ron calls representatives of a racist militia on the phone, and Flip meets with them directly.The police obtain information about the Klan's planned attack.Ron contacts David Duke (Topher Grace), the Grand Wizard of the Ku Klux Klan, by phone.Soon, Flip is accepted into the organization.Spike Lee's film won an Oscar for best adapted screenplay in 2019.Starring: versatile supporting actor Adam Driver ("What's Up, Davis?", "Silence") and former American football player John David Washington, Denzel Washington's son, nominated for a Golden Globe for this role.

credits.actor: Master Patrolman Andy Landers - Frederick Weller

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy'S First Marriage 2
programme.desc: Young married couple Georgie and Mandy are raising their daughter, learning everyday life in their new role as parents.Each day brings new challenges and fatigue that puts their relationship to the test.

programme.title: The Last Vermeer
programme.desc: The Netherlands after World War II.The accountability of Nazi criminals and their accomplices continues.A Jew, Joseph Piller (Claes Bang), who fought in the resistance movement, is to deal with the case of stolen works of art.He accuses the eccentric painter Han van Meegeren (Guy Pearce) of collaboration, who hosted Germans at his hedonistic parties and sold them valuable paintings.The artist faces a death sentence.However, he claims that he traded in fakes he created.His exquisitely crafted fakes are indistinguishable from the originals.Although the evidence points to van Meegeren's guilt, and accepting his version would make the brilliant forger a national hero, Piller begins to believe him.Together with her assistant (Vicky Krieps), she tries to prove his innocence, putting her career and good name on the line.Based on facts, the extraordinary story of a Dutch painter and one of the best art forgers in history.It was based on the biography of Han van Meegeren by Jonathan Lopez.

programme.title: You're Cordially Invited
programme.desc: A booking error causes two weddings to take place in one place at the same time.Both families face the challenge of having to share space.However, they have no intention of letting anything stop them from organizing a special ceremony for their loved one.Jim (Will Ferrell), the father of Jenni (Geraldine Viswanathan), who is getting ready to get married, and Margot (Reese Witherspoon), the sister of the second bride, Neve (Meredith Hagner), try to maintain their composure in a difficult situation, but they are still fighting a desperate duel with each other.A comedy directed by Nicholas Stoller, the creator of "Neighbors".

programme.title: The Knick
programme.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

credits.actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

credits.actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.

programme.title: House of the Dragon 2
programme.desc: The second series of the production, the events of which precede the action of "Game of Thrones".After the death of Lucerys Velaryon, the son of Queen Rhaenyra Targaryen (Emma D'Arcy), which was caused by his cousin, Aemond Targaryen (Ewan Mitchell), Westeros finds itself on the brink of a bloody civil war.The Green Council supporting King Aegon (Tom Glynn-Carney) and Queen Rhaenyra's Black Council are fighting for influence.Each side claims the Iron Throne.The dynamic development of events also affects the attitude of Rhaenyra's husband, Daemon (Matt Smith), in life.A man who spends a lot of time in Harrenhal Castle, away from his wife, changes a lot.In addition, the demons of his past begin to haunt him.

credits.actor: King Aegon II Targaryen - Tom Glynn-Carney
Lord Corlys 'The Sea Snake' Velaryon - Steve Toussaint

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: Kinds of Kindness
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated stories.Emma Stone, Jesse Plemons and Willem Dafoe play various roles.A corporate manager (Jesse Plemons) lives under the dictates of an eccentric boss (Willem Dafoe).She puts his well-being above her own and doesn't question any outlandish demands.Stripped of his dignity, he tries to free himself from total control.A policeman (Jesse Plemons) misses his wife (Emma Stone) - a biologist who disappeared during a research expedition.A woman who survived the disaster returns, but her marriage is put to the test.The husband becomes paranoid and is not sure if this is the same beloved he once married.The heroes of the last story are members of a sect who are looking for a person with the power to resurrect the dead.The work of Yórgos Lánthimos - the director of "Poor Things" which won four Oscars.For his performance, Jesse Plemons was awarded the Palme d'Or at Cannes.

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

credits.actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programme.title: Clerks 2
programme.desc: After Randal and Dante's store catches fire, the friends must find another job.They still cannot come to terms with the loss of the premises, but they have no money to rebuild it.They get a job in a fast food restaurant.Soon, Dante decides to leave with his fiancée to another state.Things get complicated when it turns out that the manager of the place is pregnant.Meanwhile, Dante's bachelor party is approaching.Randall plans to organize a party whose main attraction will be a stripper.However, an unfortunate mistake occurs and things get out of control.Sequel to Kevin Smith's debut film.

programme.title: Ainda Estou Aqui
programme.desc: Brazil, 1971. A military dictatorship is gaining strength in the country, and the lives of citizens are disrupted by detentions, disappearances and acts of violence.In these dangerous times, the Paiva family tries to live a peaceful life in Rio de Janeiro.Everything changes when one day the family patriarch, Rubens (Selton Mello), a former congressman, is summoned for a mysterious interrogation by military investigators.Soon, the officers arrest Eunice Paiva (Fernanda Torres), the mother of the family.She is kept in prison for 12 days and put under pressure to hand over her friends and associates accused of opposition activities.The traumatic experience becomes the beginning of Eunice's profound transformation.After leaving prison, she is forced to find herself again - she fights for the truth as an activist.Its goal is to expose the government's illegal actions and fight for justice for thousands of victims of the regime.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: Spaceships land in twelve different places on Earth.No one knows why the aliens chose these locations.The American military is trying to solve the mystery.For this purpose, the soldiers build a camp next to one of the mysterious objects.A talented linguist, Dr. Louise Banks, is called there.Together with Colonel G.T.Weber and physicist Ian Donnelly tries to find out what the real intentions of aliens are and determine whether humanity is in danger from them.Soon, Louise is sent to a spaceship to talk to representatives of an alien civilization.He must unravel the rules of the newcomers' language.He realizes that time plays a key role in the mysterious message.

programme.title: Barry
programme.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root Barry, a hitman from the Midwest, is transferred by Fuches to Los Angeles for acting workshops taught by guru Gene Cousineau.Barry plays the role of an absent acting student.After classes, he goes to a bar with his new friends to strengthen relationships.Over time, he begins to become fascinated with the stage and performances.Soon, one of the course participants, Sally Reed, catches the man's eye.The workshop leader allows Barry to join the group.But first he must perform a monologue in front of everyone.

programme.title: Barry
programme.desc: Barry (Bill Hader) is a low-end hitman.He is depressed, feels lonely and burnt out.Despite his reluctance, he accepts an assignment in Los Angeles, where he is to eliminate a young, aspiring actor.While tracking his target, he comes across a meeting of a theater group.Surprisingly, he feels great in the company of artists.Under their influence, he comes to the conclusion that he would like to break up with his current profession.However, it is not that simple.The originators of the series are Alec Berg, a five-time Emmy candidate, and Bill Hader, who plays the title character.The screen shows, among others:winner of two Golden Globes, Henry Winkler and Stephen Root.

programme.title: You're Cordially Invited
programme.desc: A booking error causes two weddings to take place in one place at the same time.Both families face the challenge of having to share space.However, they have no intention of letting anything stop them from organizing a special ceremony for their loved one.Jim (Will Ferrell), the father of Jenni (Geraldine Viswanathan), who is getting ready to get married, and Margot (Reese Witherspoon), the sister of the second bride, Neve (Meredith Hagner), try to maintain their composure in a difficult situation, but they are still fighting a desperate duel with each other.A comedy directed by Nicholas Stoller, the creator of "Neighbors".

programme.title: Across the Universe
programme.desc: 1960s.Young Briton Jude (Jim Sturgess) goes to the United States in search of his father, whom he has never known before.The man is said to be a university lecturer.However, he turns out to be an ordinary worker.There, Jude meets a teenage American girl, Lucy (Evan Rachel Wood).They both fall in love with each other at first sight.Soon, Lucy's brother, Max (Joe Anderson), is drafted and goes to war in Vietnam.Meanwhile, Jude and Lucy, along with a group of friends and musicians, engage in anti-war activities.Their guides are: Dr. Robert (Bono) and Mr. Kite (Eddie Izzard).Together they fight for freedom of speech and civil rights.However, the tense situation is not favorable for lovers.Adversity tears them apart.They have to overcome many obstacles to be together again.The film's soundtrack included several songs by the legendary band The Beatles.The film was nominated for a Golden Globe (Best Musical) and an Oscar (Best Costume Design).

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programme.desc: Sarah (Margot Robbie) and David (Colin Farrell) meet at a friend's wedding.They go on an expedition during which they relive the most important moments from their past.

credits.actor: Father of the Bride - Mike Meldman

programme.title: Industry 2
programme.sub-title: Short to the Point of Pain

programme.title: The Knick
programme.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

credits.actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen
